name: Magic Initiate
description: Two Cantrips and one Level 1 Spell from a chosen list.

name: Savage Attacker
description: Roll weapon damage twice and use either roll once per turn.

name: Skilled
description: Proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools.

name: Ability Score Improvement
description: Increase one score by 2 or two scores by 1.

name: Grappler
description: ASI +1, Punch and Grab, Attack Advantage, Fast Wrestler.

name: Great Weapon Fighting
description: Reroll 1s and 2s on two-handed/versatile melee damage.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
description: Add modifier to extra attack damage.

name: Boon of Combat Prowess
description: ASI +1, Turn a miss into a hit once per turn.

name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
description: ASI +1, Teleport 30ft after Attack or Magic action.

name: Boon of Fate
description: ASI +1, Add/subtract 2d4 to a d20 test within 60ft.

name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
description: ASI +1, Ignore resistance to physical damage, extra damage on Nat 20.

name: Boon of Spell Recall
description: ASI +1, Chance to not expend slots for levels 1-4.

name: Boon of the Night Spirit
description: ASI +1, Invisibility and resistance in dim light/darkness.
